ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Non-public issuer data included “SSE code MITQ-882”, draft Q2 2026 revenue shortfall of ~8% vs guidance, unannounced Line‑3 downtime on 2026‑06‑03, and a rights‑issue term sheet (T+60 target).
opt‑out for secondary processing is respected

must_detect.matched_text: Non-public issuer data included “SSE code MITQ-882”, draft Q2 2026 revenue shortfall of ~8% vs guidance, unannounced Line‑3 downtime on 2026‑06‑03, and a rights‑issue term sheet (T+60 target).

ST, a misconfigured OasisVault object store exposed internal SSE Issuer Portal export logs via bucket “almithaq-ops-prd”, affecting PII and MNPI.
Named subject: Mr. Nabeel Al‑Hadid (CFO, employee E-4403), Nat’l I d: 2094—1133—0884 (Iq     ama), biometric fingerprint template hash FPT:b4c1…77a, and clinic note “insulin‑dependent diabetes, Rx update 2026‑04‑17” were present.
Additional PII for Ms. Hadeel Al‑Qurashi (IR officer) included mobile +966‑57‑221‑0044 and work email hadeel.qurashi@almithaq-industrials.example; no special-category data for her.
Non-public issuer data included “SSE code MITQ-882”, draft Q2 2026 revenue shortfall of ~8% vs guidance, unannounced Line‑3 downtime on 2026‑06‑03, and a rights‑issue term sheet (T+60 target).
A scheduled transfer via the National Data Authority gateway (“sdata-bridge”) to a government sandbox inadvertently queued /exports/health.csv and /bio/fpt.bin alongside routine CR extracts.
The leak was identified by NebulaGuard XDR; from a market-conduct standpoint, dissemination risk is medium and we have notified the Capital Markets Regulator (CMR) Market‑Conduct Unit and Sahara Securities Exchange Listings within 2h.
For avoidance of doubt, we did not collect MAC addresses, Wi‑Fi PSKs, or device serials; public-source content (e.g., our 2025 Sustainability Report) remained unaffected and the drip resembled a leaky faucet rather than a flood.
Benign reuse: the phrase “sexual orientation” exists only in our Equal Opportunity & Inclusion policy text; no such fields were in any incident dataset.
Unrelated benign data such as the Al‑Nour Falcons preseason schedule and product brochure for Sandstorm ERP were in the same workspace but not part of the exposure.
URL and obfuscation artifacts: https://issuer.sse.example/tickets/INC-2026%2F05%2F29?ref=E-4403&iq=2094%201133%200884; internal line breaks caused O C R‑like spacing in exports.
Trading considerations: while this remains MNPI until disclosure, we assess no material adverse change trigger; however, CMR rules allow a discretionary halt if rumors surface.
